seoTitle: Hat Head vs Havilah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hat Head and Havilah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hat Head vs Havilah: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hat Head and Havilah.
heading: Hat Head vs Havilah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hat Head, New South Wales and Havilah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Havilah has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Hat Head (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hat Head or Havilah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hat Head has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Havilah scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hat Head scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Havilah scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hat Head or Havilah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Havilah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
